title: tragacantha arequipensis var. normalis
intro: Tragacantha arequipensis var. normalis, also known as the Arequipa Spanish needle, is a type of spiny plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha arequipensis var. normalis include its ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or infusoria, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety in modern medicine.
